451.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'He exclaimed: "Haircut! Shave!" — I believe she means the Prophet ﷺ said this — thinking she would delay them. We said: O Messenger of Allah, she already performed Tawaf on the Day of Sacrifice. He said: Then it is fine — tell her to depart.'
451.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Beliau berkata keras: "Gunting rambut! Cukur!" — aku kira ia maksudkan Nabi ﷺ berkata demikian — mengira ia akan menunda mereka. Kami berkata: Wahai Rasulullah, ia sudah melakukan Tawaf pada hari Idul Adha. Beliau berkata: Kalau begitu tidak masalah — suruh ia berangkat.'

452.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'I told him: Abu Bakr is a tender-hearted man — whenever he stands in your place he cannot be heard by the people. Would you not command Umar?' He said: 'Indeed you women are like the companions of Yusuf. Command Abu Bakr to lead the people in prayer.' So they commanded Abu Bakr to lead. When he had begun the prayer, the Messenger of Allah ﷺ felt some ease and rose, supported between two men, his feet dragging on the ground, until he entered the mosque.',
452.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku memberitahunya: Abu Bakar adalah seorang yang lembut hatinya — setiap kali ia berdiri di tempatmu, ia tidak dapat didengar oleh orang-orang. Tidakkah engkau memerintahkan Umar?' Beliau bersabda: 'Sesungguhnya kalian wanita seperti para sahabat Yusuf. Perintahkan Abu Bakar untuk mengimami orang-orang dalam shalat.' Maka mereka memerintahkan Abu Bakar untuk mengimami. Ketika ia telah memulai shalat, Rasulullah ﷺ merasakan keringanan dan bangkit, dipapah di antara dua orang, dengan kedua kakinya diseret di tanah, hingga masuk ke masjid.'

453.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her), from the Prophet ﷺ, with a similar meaning through the chain of Talha ibn Abd al-Malik from al-Qasim. Abu Abd al-Rahman said: 'This is a rare hadith from the narrations of Yahya ibn Sa'id.'
453.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha), dari Nabi ﷺ, dengan makna yang serupa melalui sanad Thalhah bin Abd al-Malik dari al-Qasim. Abu Abd al-Rahman berkata: 'Ini adalah hadis yang langka dari riwayat Yahya bin Sa'id.'

454.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ would become ritually impure during the night, then perform ablution as for prayer until morning without touching water for a full bath.'
454.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ terkadang dalam keadaan junub di malam hari, kemudian berwudhu sebagaimana wudhu untuk shalat hingga pagi tanpa menyentuh air untuk mandi besar.'

455.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said to her: 'Jibril, peace be upon him, conveys greetings of peace to you.' She said: 'I replied: And upon him be peace and the mercy of Allah.'
455.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ berkata kepadanya: 'Jibril 'alaihissalam menyampaikan salam kepadamu.' Ia berkata: 'Aku menjawab: Dan atasnya pula salam dan rahmat Allah.'

456.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she was among the women performing sa'y between Safa and Marwa and saw a woman wearing a garment with cross patterns. She said to her: 'Remove this from your garment, for whenever the Messenger of Allah ﷺ saw it on a garment, he would cut it off.'
456.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berada di antara wanita-wanita yang melakukan sa'i antara Safa dan Marwa dan melihat seorang wanita yang mengenakan pakaian bermotif salib. Ia berkata kepadanya: 'Lepaskan ini dari pakaianmu, karena setiap kali Rasulullah ﷺ melihatnya pada pakaian, beliau memotongnya.'

457.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'A piece of dried gazelle meat was presented as a gift to the Messenger of Allah ﷺ while he was in a state of ihram, and he did not eat it.'
457.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Sepotong daging rusa kering dipersembahkan sebagai hadiah kepada Rasulullah ﷺ sementara beliau dalam keadaan ihram, dan beliau tidak memakannya.'

458.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ would raise his hands in supplication until I would grow weary watching him raise them so long. He would say: "O Allah, I am only a human being — do not punish me for verbally abusing or harming a person I may have cursed or hurt."'
458.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ biasa mengangkat tangannya dalam berdoa hingga aku merasa lelah melihatnya mengangkat keduanya begitu lama. Beliau mengucapkan: "Ya Allah, aku hanyalah seorang manusia — janganlah Engkau menghukumku karena memaki atau menyakiti seseorang yang mungkin telah aku kutuk atau sakiti."'

459.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'I would lie with my legs stretched toward the qiblah of the Prophet ﷺ. When he wanted to prostrate he would nudge me and I would pull my legs in. When he stood up I would stretch them out again.' She said: 'At that time there were no lamps in the houses.'
459.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku berbaring dengan kakiku terentang ke arah kiblat Nabi ﷺ. Ketika beliau ingin bersujud beliau menyentuhku dan aku menarik kakiku. Ketika beliau berdiri aku merentangkannya lagi.' Ia berkata: 'Pada waktu itu tidak ada lampu di rumah-rumah.'

460.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she would not stop at al-Muhassab during Hajj, and she said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ stopped there only because it was a place that made his departure easier.'
460.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia tidak berhenti di al-Muhassab saat haji, dan ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ berhenti di sana hanya karena itu adalah tempat yang memudahkan keberangkatannya.'

461.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) or Abu Hurayra that when the Prophet ﷺ wanted to slaughter his sacrificial animals, he would buy two large, fat, black-and-white, horned, castrated rams. He would slaughter one on behalf of his ummah — those who affirmed the oneness of Allah and bore witness that he had conveyed the message — and the other on behalf of Muhammad and the family of Muhammad.
461.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) atau Abu Hurairah bahwa ketika Nabi ﷺ ingin menyembelih hewan kurbannya, beliau membeli dua ekor domba jantan yang besar, gemuk, berbulu hitam-putih, bertanduk, dan dikebiri. Beliau menyembelih satu atas nama umatnya — mereka yang menegaskan keesaan Allah dan bersaksi bahwa beliau telah menyampaikan risalah — dan yang lain atas nama Muhammad dan keluarga Muhammad.

462.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'I used to twist the garlands for the sacrificial animals of the Prophet ﷺ. He would then send them off, and he did not abstain from anything that a person in ihram abstains from.'
462.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku biasa menganyam kalung untuk hewan kurban Nabi ﷺ. Beliau kemudian mengirimnya, dan beliau tidak berpantang dari apa pun yang dipantang oleh orang yang berihram.'

463.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that Hind bint Utbah said to the Prophet ﷺ: 'O Messenger of Allah, Abu Sufyan is a stingy man — is there harm in me spending on his dependents from his wealth without his permission?' The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'There is no harm in you spending on them appropriately.'
463.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Hindun binti Utbah berkata kepada Nabi ﷺ: 'Wahai Rasulullah, Abu Sufyan adalah seorang yang pelit — apakah ada dosa bagiku jika aku membelanjakan untuk tanggungannya dari hartanya tanpa izinnya?' Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Tidak ada dosa bagimu membelanjakannya untuk mereka dengan cara yang wajar.'

464.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'The Prophet ﷺ used to pray nine rak'ahs at night. When he became heavier and older, he prayed seven rak'ahs.'
464.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Nabi ﷺ biasa shalat sembilan rakaat di malam hari. Ketika beliau menjadi lebih berat badannya dan bertambah tua, beliau shalat tujuh rakaat.'

465.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'The Prophet ﷺ recited quietly in the two rak'ahs of Fajr and recited in them Surah al-Kafirun and Surah al-Ikhlas.'
465.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Nabi ﷺ membaca dengan suara pelan dalam dua rakaat Subuh dan membaca di dalamnya Surah Al-Kafirun dan Surah Al-Ikhlas.'

466.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ was asked about al-bit' — a drink made from honey — and said: 'Every drink that intoxicates is forbidden. Al-bit' is honey wine.'
466.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ ditanya tentang al-bit' — minuman yang terbuat dari madu — dan beliau bersabda: 'Setiap minuman yang memabukkan adalah haram. Al-bit' adalah arak madu.'

467.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that a woman came to the Prophet ﷺ and said that Abd al-Rahman ibn al-Zubayr was incapable. The Messenger of Allah ﷺ smiled at her and said: 'Do you want to go back to Rifa'ah? No — not until you taste his sweetness and he tastes yours.' Abu Bakr was sitting with the Prophet ﷺ and Khalid ibn Sa'id was at the door of the room waiting for permission. Khalid called out to Abu Bakr: 'O Abu Bakr, listen to what this woman is saying openly before the Prophet ﷺ!'
467.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa seorang wanita datang kepada Nabi ﷺ dan mengatakan bahwa Abd al-Rahman bin al-Zubayr tidak mampu. Rasulullah ﷺ tersenyum padanya dan bersabda: 'Apakah kamu ingin kembali kepada Rifa'ah? Tidak — tidak sampai kamu merasakan manisnya dan ia merasakan manismu.' Abu Bakar duduk bersama Nabi ﷺ dan Khalid bin Sa'id berada di pintu kamar menunggu izin. Khalid berteriak kepada Abu Bakar: 'Wahai Abu Bakar, dengarlah apa yang dikatakan wanita ini secara terbuka di hadapan Nabi ﷺ!'

468.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she mentioned to the Prophet ﷺ that Uthman prayed throughout the night and fasted during the day. The Messenger of Allah ﷺ met Uthman and said: 'O Uthman, monasticism has not been prescribed for us. Do you not have in me a good example? By Allah, I am the most fearful of you before Allah and the most observant of His boundaries.'
468.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia menyebutkan kepada Nabi ﷺ bahwa Utsman shalat sepanjang malam dan berpuasa di siang hari. Rasulullah ﷺ menemui Utsman dan bersabda: 'Wahai Utsman, kerahiban tidak diwajibkan bagi kita. Tidakkah ada teladan yang baik bagimu pada diriku? Demi Allah, aku adalah yang paling takut di antara kalian kepada Allah dan yang paling menjaga batas-batas-Nya.'

469.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Makhzumi tracker who saw the boy said: 'Look at the resemblance to Utbah.' Aisha said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ saw a resemblance no one could deny to Utbah. Abd ibn Zam'ah said: O Messenger of Allah, he is my brother — born on my father's bed from his concubine. The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: "The child belongs to the marital bed. Veil yourself from him, O Sawda." By Allah, she never saw him until she died.'
469.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa pelacak dari Makhzum yang melihat bocah itu berkata: 'Perhatikan kemiripannya dengan Utbah.' Aisyah berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ melihat kemiripan yang tidak dapat disangkal siapa pun dengan Utbah. Abd bin Zam'ah berkata: Wahai Rasulullah, ia adalah saudaraku — lahir di tempat tidur ayahku dari budak perempuannya. Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: "Anak itu milik tempat tidur pernikahan. Berhijablah darinya, wahai Saudah." Demi Allah, ia tidak pernah melihatnya hingga ia meninggal.'

470.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that a tracker saw Usamah and Zayd sleeping in a garment with their feet sticking out and said: 'These feet belong to each other.'
470.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa seorang pelacak melihat Usamah dan Zaid tidur dalam sehelai kain dengan kaki mereka menjulur keluar dan berkata: 'Kaki-kaki ini saling berhubungan satu sama lain.'

471.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'The Prophet ﷺ entered upon me with his face beaming with joy.'
471.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Nabi ﷺ masuk menemuiku dengan wajah berseri-seri penuh kebahagiaan.'

472.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she described the i'tikaf incident: Aisha and Hafsa both had tents set up for them during i'tikaf. When Zaynab saw their tents she had one set up for herself too. When the Messenger of Allah ﷺ saw this, he said: 'Is it righteousness you seek?' and he did not perform i'tikaf during Ramadan that year — instead he performed it during the ten days of Shawwal.
472.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia menggambarkan kejadian i'tikaf: Aisyah dan Hafsah keduanya memiliki tenda yang didirikan untuk mereka selama i'tikaf. Ketika Zainab melihat tenda-tenda mereka, ia pun meminta tendanya sendiri didirikan. Ketika Rasulullah ﷺ melihat ini, beliau berkata: 'Apakah kebaikan yang kalian cari?' dan beliau tidak melakukan i'tikaf selama Ramadan tahun itu — sebagai gantinya beliau melakukan i'tikaf selama sepuluh hari Syawal.

473.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ never sent Zayd ibn Harithah on an expedition without placing him in command. Had he lived after him, he would have appointed him as his successor.'
473.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ tidak pernah mengirim Zaid bin Haritsah dalam ekspedisi tanpa menempatkannya sebagai komandan. Seandainya ia hidup setelah beliau, beliau pasti akan mengangkatnya sebagai penggantinya.'

474.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'It was mentioned to the Messenger of Allah ﷺ that some people disliked facing the qiblah with their private parts.' He said: 'Have they really done that? Turn my seat to face the qiblah.'
474.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Disebutkan kepada Rasulullah ﷺ bahwa beberapa orang tidak suka menghadapkan aurat mereka ke arah kiblat.' Beliau bersabda: 'Benarkah mereka melakukan itu? Putar tempat dudukku menghadap kiblat.'

475.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to perform Witr with nine rak'ahs. When he grew heavier, he prayed seven rak'ahs, then prayed two rak'ahs seated.
475.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ biasa melakukan Witr dengan sembilan rakaat. Ketika beliau menjadi lebih berat, beliau shalat tujuh rakaat, kemudian shalat dua rakaat sambil duduk.

476.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'When the two circumcised parts meet, a ritual bath is required.'
476.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Ketika dua bagian yang dikhitan bertemu, maka wajib mandi besar.'

477.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that a man asked her about praying sitting and said: 'I cannot pray except sitting — what do you think?' She said: 'I heard the Messenger of Allah ﷺ say: "The prayer of a man sitting is equal to half his prayer standing."'
477.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa seorang laki-laki bertanya kepadanya tentang shalat sambil duduk dan berkata: 'Aku tidak bisa shalat kecuali sambil duduk — bagaimana menurut engkau?' Ia berkata: 'Aku mendengar Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: "Shalat seorang laki-laki sambil duduk sama dengan setengah shalatnya sambil berdiri."'

478.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'When the Messenger of Allah ﷺ recited while standing, he would bow while standing. And when he recited while sitting, he would bow while sitting.'
478.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Ketika Rasulullah ﷺ membaca sambil berdiri, beliau ruku sambil berdiri. Dan ketika beliau membaca sambil duduk, beliau ruku sambil duduk.'

479.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'Some people used to pronounce their talbiyah for Manat, the tyrant idol that they worshipped near al-Mushallal, and they felt it was wrong to perform sa'y between Safa and Marwa. They asked the Messenger of Allah ﷺ about this, and Allah revealed: "Indeed Safa and Marwa are among the Signs of Allah. So whoever performs Hajj or Umrah, there is no blame on him for walking between them." (2:158) Then the Messenger of Allah ﷺ established the sa'y between them as a practice, so no one may abandon it.'
479.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Sebagian orang biasa mengucapkan talbiyah untuk Manat, berhala tiran yang mereka sembah di dekat al-Musylal, dan mereka merasa tidak boleh melakukan sa'i antara Safa dan Marwa. Mereka bertanya kepada Rasulullah ﷺ tentang hal ini, dan Allah menurunkan: "Sesungguhnya Safa dan Marwa adalah sebagian dari tanda-tanda Allah. Maka barang siapa yang berhaji ke Baitullah atau berumrah, tidak ada dosa baginya berjalan di antara keduanya." (2:158) Kemudian Rasulullah ﷺ menetapkan sa'i di antara keduanya sebagai amalan, sehingga tidak seorang pun boleh meninggalkannya.'

480.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she was asked: 'With what did the Messenger of Allah ﷺ perform Witr?' She replied: 'He would recite in the first rak'ah: "Glorify the Name of your Lord Most High" (87); in the second: "Say: O you disbelievers" (109); and in the third: "Say: He is Allah, the One" (112) and the two seeking-refuge surahs.'
480.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia ditanya: 'Dengan apa Rasulullah ﷺ melakukan Witr?' Ia menjawab: 'Beliau membaca pada rakaat pertama: "Sucikanlah nama Tuhanmu Yang Maha Tinggi" (87); pada rakaat kedua: "Katakanlah: Wahai orang-orang kafir" (109); dan pada rakaat ketiga: "Katakanlah: Dialah Allah Yang Maha Esa" (112) dan dua surah pencarian perlindungan.'

481.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'When he recited standing he would bow standing, and when he recited sitting he would bow sitting.' She was also asked about the fasting of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ. She replied: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ would fast so much that we would say: He has fasted, he has fasted, he has fasted. And he would go without fasting to the point we would say: He has broken fast, he has broken fast, he has broken fast. And he never completed a full month of fasting from the time he came to Madinah, other than Ramadan.'
481.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Ketika beliau membaca sambil berdiri, beliau ruku sambil berdiri, dan ketika beliau membaca sambil duduk, beliau ruku sambil duduk.' Ia juga ditanya tentang puasa Rasulullah ﷺ. Ia menjawab: 'Rasulullah ﷺ berpuasa begitu banyak hingga kami berkata: Beliau berpuasa, beliau berpuasa, beliau berpuasa. Dan beliau melewatkan puasa hingga kami berkata: Beliau berbuka, beliau berbuka, beliau berbuka. Dan beliau tidak pernah menyelesaikan satu bulan penuh puasa sejak beliau tiba di Madinah, selain Ramadan.'

482.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that during the Prophet's ﷺ illness he said: 'O, my head!' She jokingly said: 'What harm would it do you if you died before me — I would wash you, shroud you, pray over you, and bury you.' He replied: 'Rather, I think I see you afterward bringing one of your wives to your house.' She said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ smiled at that, and then his illness began that led to his death.'
482.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa selama sakit Nabi ﷺ beliau berkata: 'Oh, kepalaku!' Ia bercanda berkata: 'Apa ruginya bagimu jika engkau meninggal sebelumku — aku akan memandikanmu, mengkafanimu, menshalatimu, dan menguburmu.' Beliau menjawab: 'Justru aku pikir aku melihatmu setelah itu membawa salah satu istrimu ke rumahmu.' Ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ tersenyum pada hal itu, dan kemudian sakitnya dimulai yang berujung pada kematiannya.'

483.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she was asked about adding hair extensions to beautify the hair. She replied: 'I heard a woman ask the Messenger of Allah ﷺ about the same thing and he said: "Allah has cursed the one who adds hair and the one who has it added."'
483.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia ditanya tentang menambahkan sambungan rambut untuk memperindah rambut. Ia menjawab: 'Aku mendengar seorang wanita bertanya kepada Rasulullah ﷺ tentang hal yang sama dan beliau bersabda: "Allah melaknat orang yang menambahkan rambut dan orang yang meminta untuk ditambahkan."'

484.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ only ever performed Umrah in Dhu al-Qa'dah — and he performed three Umrahs.'
484.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ tidak pernah melakukan Umrah kecuali di bulan Dzulqa'dah — dan beliau melakukan tiga kali Umrah.'

485.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she was asked about a ring and was told: 'Do not use it as iron.' She replied: 'Make it silver and color it with a little saffron.' She was also asked about the prayer of the Prophet ﷺ and replied with the same account as Muhammad ibn Salama's hadith.
485.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia ditanya tentang sebuah cincin dan diberitahu: 'Jangan menjadikannya dari besi.' Ia menjawab: 'Jadikanlah dari perak dan warnailah dengan sedikit kunyit.' Ia juga ditanya tentang shalat Nabi ﷺ dan menjawab dengan riwayat yang sama dengan hadis Muhammad bin Salamah.

486.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that Sahla bint Suhayl said: 'Salim used to come to me and Abu Hudhayfa — now Allah has revealed His Book saying: "Attribute them to their fathers." He used to enter upon me freely when the dwelling was small.' She was told: 'Breastfeed Salim and you will become forbidden to him.'
486.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Sahlah binti Suhail berkata: 'Salim biasa datang kepadaku dan Abu Hudzaifah — kini Allah telah menurunkan Kitab-Nya yang menyatakan: "Nisbatkanlah mereka kepada ayah-ayah mereka." Ia biasa masuk menemuiku dengan bebas ketika tempat tinggal sempit.' Ia diberitahu: 'Susuilah Salim dan kamu akan menjadi terlarang baginya.'

487.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she described the Prophet ﷺ coming out while ill — one hand resting on al-Fadl ibn Abbas and the other on another man, dragging his feet on the ground. Ubayd Allah said: 'I mentioned this to Ibn Abbas, and he asked: Do you know who the other man is who Aisha did not name? It is Ali — but Aisha could not bring herself to name him favorably.'
487.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia menggambarkan Nabi ﷺ keluar dalam keadaan sakit — satu tangan bertumpu pada al-Fadhl bin Abbas dan tangan lainnya pada orang lain, dengan kaki terseret di tanah. Ubaid Allah berkata: 'Aku menyebutkan ini kepada Ibnu Abbas, dan ia bertanya: Tahukah kamu siapa orang lain yang tidak disebutkan namanya oleh Aisyah? Itu adalah Ali — tetapi Aisyah tidak bisa menyebut namanya secara positif.'

488.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said during his illness: "Pour over me water from seven vessels whose knots have not been untied — perhaps I can then rest and give my people some final words."' She said: 'We seated him in a large copper basin belonging to Hafsa and poured water over him from those vessels until he began signaling to us that we had done enough. Then he went out.'
488.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ berkata selama sakitnya: "Tuangkanlah atasku air dari tujuh tempat penyimpanan yang belum dibuka simpulnya — mungkin aku bisa beristirahat lalu menyampaikan beberapa pesan terakhir kepada umatku."' Ia berkata: 'Kami mendudukkan beliau di baskom besar dari tembaga milik Hafsah dan menuangkan air ke atasnya dari tempat-tempat penyimpanan tersebut hingga beliau mulai memberi isyarat kepada kami bahwa itu sudah cukup. Kemudian beliau keluar.'

489.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ, whenever he felt distressed during his illness, would cover his face. When distress intensified, he uncovered his face and said: 'May the curse of Allah be upon the Jews and Christians — they took the graves of their prophets as places of worship.' She said: 'He was warning against doing what they did.'
489.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ, setiap kali merasakan penderitaan selama sakitnya, menutupi wajahnya. Ketika penderitaan meningkat, beliau membuka wajahnya dan bersabda: 'Semoga laknat Allah menimpa orang-orang Yahudi dan Nasrani — mereka menjadikan kuburan para nabi mereka sebagai tempat ibadah.' Ia berkata: 'Beliau memperingatkan agar tidak melakukan apa yang mereka lakukan.'

490.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'My concern was only that people might regard as a bad omen the first person to stand in the place of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ. So I argued the matter two or three times. He said: "Let Abu Bakr lead the people in prayer — indeed you women are like the companions of Yusuf."'
490.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Kekhawatiranku hanyalah bahwa orang-orang mungkin akan menganggap sial orang pertama yang berdiri di tempat Rasulullah ﷺ. Maka aku memperdebatkan masalah itu dua atau tiga kali. Beliau bersabda: "Biarkanlah Abu Bakar mengimami orang-orang dalam shalat — sesungguhnya kalian wanita seperti para sahabat Yusuf."'

491.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the talbiyah of the Prophet ﷺ was recited three times: 'Labbayk, Allahumma labbayk, labbayk — la sharika laka labbayk. Inna al-hamda wa al-ni'mata laka — Here I am, O Allah, here I am, here I am — there is no partner for You, here I am. All praise and blessing belong to You.'
491.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa talbiyah Nabi ﷺ diucapkan tiga kali: 'Labbayk, Allahumma labbayk, labbayk — la syarika laka labbayk. Innal-hamda wan-ni'mata laka — Aku penuhi panggilan-Mu, Ya Allah, aku penuhi panggilan-Mu, aku penuhi panggilan-Mu — tidak ada sekutu bagi-Mu, aku penuhi panggilan-Mu. Sesungguhnya segala puji dan nikmat adalah milik-Mu.'

492.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Hand me the prayer mat from the mosque.' She replied: 'I am menstruating.' He said: 'Your menstruation is not in your hand.'
492.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Berikan aku sajadah dari masjid.' Ia menjawab: 'Aku sedang haid.' Beliau bersabda: 'Haidmu tidak ada di tanganmu.'

493.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that a woman had been given only a single kiss — from which no actual intercourse took place. She mentioned this to the Prophet ﷺ and asked whether she would be lawful again for her first husband. The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'You are not lawful for your first husband until the other one has tasted your sweetness and you have tasted his.'
493.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa seorang wanita hanya menerima satu kali ciuman — yang darinya tidak terjadi hubungan intim sesungguhnya. Ia menyebutkan hal ini kepada Nabi ﷺ dan bertanya apakah ia akan halal kembali untuk suami pertamanya. Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Kamu tidak halal untuk suami pertamamu sampai yang lain merasakan manismu dan kamu merasakan manisnya.'

494.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'A curtain with images of winged horses was hung at my door.' When the Messenger of Allah ﷺ saw it, he said: 'Remove it.'
494.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Sebuah tirai bergambar kuda bersayap digantung di pintuku.' Ketika Rasulullah ﷺ melihatnya, beliau bersabda: 'Lepaskan itu.'

495.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ would sometimes reach morning while in a state of ritual impurity, then take a bath and complete his fast.'
495.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ terkadang memasuki pagi hari dalam keadaan junub, kemudian mandi dan menyempurnakan puasanya.'

496.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ never struck a servant, nor a wife, nor struck anything with his hand — except when striving in the cause of Allah. And nothing was ever done to him personally for which he would take revenge — unless the sanctities of Allah were violated, in which case he would take revenge for the sake of Allah. And whenever two matters were presented to him, he always chose the easier one — unless it was sinful, in which case he was the farthest of all from it.'
496.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ tidak pernah memukul seorang pembantu, tidak pula seorang istri, dan tidak pernah memukul sesuatu pun dengan tangannya — kecuali ketika berjihad di jalan Allah. Dan tidak ada sesuatu pun yang dilakukan kepada beliau secara pribadi yang membuat beliau membalas dendam — kecuali jika kehormatan-kehormatan Allah dilanggar, maka beliau mengambil tindakan demi Allah. Dan setiap kali dua hal disodorkan kepadanya, beliau selalu memilih yang lebih mudah — kecuali jika itu adalah dosa, maka beliau adalah yang paling jauh darinya di antara semua orang.'

497.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'I replied to them saying: And upon you — and the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: Did I not respond to what they said? I said: And upon you. Indeed Allah, the Mighty and Majestic, does not love obscenity or indecent speech.' Ibn Numayr said: Then this verse was revealed: 'And when they come to you, they greet you with a greeting with which Allah does not greet you' (58:8) — to the end.
497.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku menjawab mereka dengan berkata: Dan atas kalian pula — dan Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: Bukankah aku telah membalas apa yang mereka katakan? Aku berkata: Dan atas kalian. Sesungguhnya Allah Yang Maha Mulia lagi Maha Agung tidak menyukai kekejian atau ucapan tidak senonoh.' Ibnu Numayr berkata: Kemudian ayat ini turun: 'Dan apabila mereka datang kepadamu, mereka menyapamu dengan sapaan yang tidak digunakan Allah untuk menyapamu' (58:8) — sampai akhir.

498.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'I used to bathe with the Messenger of Allah ﷺ from a single vessel.'
498.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku biasa mandi bersama Rasulullah ﷺ dari satu bejana.'

499.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'Stopping at al-Abtah is not a sunnah. The Messenger of Allah ﷺ stopped there only because it was easier for his departure, peace and blessings be upon him.'
499.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Berhenti di al-Abtah bukanlah sunnah. Rasulullah ﷺ berhenti di sana hanya karena itu lebih memudahkan keberangkatannya, shalawat dan salam atasnya.'

500.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'I used to wash the head of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ while he was in i'tikaf — and I was menstruating.'
500.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku biasa mencuci kepala Rasulullah ﷺ sementara beliau sedang beri'tikaf — dan aku sedang haid.'
